title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Puravankara is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Puravankara are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Puravankara:
Puravankara is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puravankara!
